'''Turhaya's Landspeeder Repair Shop''' was a small-time localized business run by [[Jamie Turhaya]] in the city of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. True to its name, it offered fast and effective [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] repair for the citizens of the busy town. The company was established several years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="Passages" />

However, the shop was nearly lost in [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]] when Jamie Turhaya's brother, [[Matt Turhaya]], carelessly bet the company in a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] match with the [[Riileb (species)|Riileb]] [[Tere Metallo]]. Luckily for the company and Jamie, Metallo refused to take the company as payment after claiming victory due to the fact that Matt was not a full partner in the corporation. As such, Metallo forced Matt to repay his debt aboard her ship, the ''[[Star Quest]]'' as a new crew member, and allowed Jamie to retain the company.<ref name="Passages" />
